results.title: Telangana CM orders setup of digital governance panel
results.description: Telangana Chief Minister A Revanth Reddy on Tuesday directed officials to constitute a committee to strengthen ‘digital governance’ in the State. Reddy, who held a meeting with officials, said the committee, comprising officials, should submit its report in 100 days. He sought details of the implementation of ‘digital governance’ and instructed officials to formulate plans for digital governance and draft relevant legislation, a release said.

results.title: Honda to generate 3,800 jobs in India by 2028 through two-wheeler capacity boost
results.description: Honda Motorcycle & Scooter India will add over 3,800 jobs by 2028, with its Vithalapur plant in Gujarat set to become Honda's largest motorcycle assembly plant globally after expansion.

results.title: Mapping out telco coverage
results.description: MEMBER for Mallee and Anne Webster says Telstra’s new map is finally validating the regional customer’s lived experience with the phone provider. The recent mandate by the Australian Communications and Media Authority now requires Telstra and other telcos to publish consistent 4G and 5G coverage maps to reflect what customers can reasonably expect from an [...]
